methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series A → next-stage step-up multiplier (2.0x) to $1.0B total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 6 same-sector + same/adjacent-stage peers in Biotech & Health. Range: $100M - $3.3B.

methods.name: Public-Comp Anchoring
methods.skip_reason: target revenue not on file (private companies rarely disclose)
methods.rationale: Public Biotech & Health P/S median is 7.4x across 3 tickers. Cannot apply without target's revenue.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Biotech & Health
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Biotech & Health
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Biotech & Health

private.name: Zeta Surgical
private.rationale: Same sector (Biotech & Health), same stage (Series A), post-money $100M

data.narrative:
Retro Biosciences is a Series A-stage biotech company that has raised $180M to date. The valuation analysis draws on a comparable universe of 11 companies across the Biotech & Health sector: 3 public-market names (RXRX, TEM, ONT.L) and 8 private peers including Eikon Therapeutics, Neko Health, Asimov, and Profluent.

Two triangulation methods are applicable. Stage-progression analysis applies a 2.0x step-up multiplier from the $1.0B total-raised proxy, implying a $2.0B valuation. Peer-median anchoring draws on 6 same-sector, same/adjacent-stage comparables with a median valuation of $805M and a range from $100M to $3.3B. Public-comp anchoring via price-to-sales cannot be applied; the sector median P/S multiple is 7.4x across three tickers, but the target's revenue is not on file, precluding this method.

Triangulating the two applicable methods yields a valuation range of $684M (low) to $2.3B (high), with a median of $1.4B. The 3.4x spread reflects meaningful dispersion in stage-progression assumptions versus peer clustering. Key uncertainties include the appropriate stage-progression multiplier for frontier biotech (peer comparables cluster at Series B, one stage ahead) and whether total capital raised is a reliable proxy for asset value at this technology-risk stage.
